problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
